body:
## Problem

The 8 gear brand landing pages (`/gear/tama`, `/gear/pearl`, `/gear/zildjian`, `/gear/paiste`, `/gear/meinl`, `/gear/sabian`, `/gear/dw`, `/gear/ludwig`) are in the sitemap (from `api/sitemap.js` gearBrands array) but serve the **generic fallback meta**.

Current code flow in `api/meta/[...path].js`:
1. `gearCategoryMatch = path.match(/^\/gear\/([a-z-]+)$/)` → matches `/gear/tama`
2. `GEAR_CATEGORY_META['tama']` → `undefined` (GEAR_CATEGORY_META only has cymbals/snares/drums/pedals/sticks/hardware)
3. Falls through → generic SPA fallback

Distinct from:
- #1300 (/gear hub — `/gear` itself, already approved)
- #1301 (/gear/<category-slug> for the 6 category pages, already approved)

These are the 8 brand pages (tama/pearl/dw/ludwig/zildjian/paiste/meinl/sabian).

## Fix

**File:** `api/meta/[...path].js`

Add a `GEAR_BRAND_META` lookup map and handler before the generic category check:

```js
const GEAR_BRAND_META = {
  tama: { name: 'Tama', type: 'drum kits', tagline: 'Premier Japanese drum manufacturer used by Eloy Casagrande, Tomas Haake, and more.' },
  pearl: { name: 'Pearl', type: 'drum kits', tagline: 'Pearl drums used by Joey Jordison, Gene Hoglan, and top metal drummers worldwide.' },
  dw: { name: 'DW', type: 'drum kits', tagline: 'Drum Workshop (DW) kits used by Danny Carey, Mike Mangini, and legendary metal drummers.' },
  ludwig: { name: 'Ludwig', type: 'drum kits', tagline: 'Ludwig drums — iconic brand used by John Bonham-influenced metal drummers.' },
  zildjian: { name: 'Zildjian', type: 'cymbals', tagline: 'Zildjian cymbals used by Lars Ulrich, Matt Greiner, and top metal drummers for 400+ years.' },
  paiste: { name: 'Paiste', type: 'cymbals', tagline: 'Paiste cymbals — Swiss precision used by Tomas Haake, Hellhammer, and extreme metal pros.' },
  meinl: { name: 'Meinl', type: 'cymbals', tagline: 'Meinl cymbals used by Matt Halpern, Gavin Harrison, and progressive metal elite.' },
  sabian: { name: 'Sabian', type: 'cymbals', tagline: 'Sabian cymbals used by Neil Peart, Charlie Benante, and leading metal drummers.' },
};

const gearBrandMatch = path.match(/^\/gear\/([a-z]+)$/);
if (gearBrandMatch) {
  const brandSlug = gearBrandMatch[1];
  const brand = GEAR_BRAND_META[brandSlug];
  if (brand) {
    return {
      title: `${brand.name} ${brand.type === 'drum kits' ? 'Drums' : 'Cymbals'} — Metal Drummers Who Use ${brand.name} | ${SITE_NAME}`,
      description: brand.tagline,
      image: DEFAULT_IMAGE,
      type: 'website',
      url: `${BASE_URL}/gear/${brandSlug}`,
      articleSchema: JSON.stringify({
        '@context': 'https://schema.org',
        '@type': 'CollectionPage',
        name: `Metal Drummers Who Use ${brand.name}`,
        description: brand.tagline,
        url: `${BASE_URL}/gear/${brandSlug}`,
        breadcrumb: {
          '@type': 'BreadcrumbList',
          itemListElement: [
            { '@type': 'ListItem', position: 1, name: 'Home', item: BASE_URL },
            { '@type': 'ListItem', position: 2, name: 'Gear', item: `${BASE_URL}/gear` },
            { '@type': 'ListItem', position: 3, name: brand.name, item: `${BASE_URL}/gear/${brandSlug}` },
          ],
        },
      }),
    };
  }
}
```

## 8 brand pages to cover
tama, pearl, dw, ludwig, zildjian, paiste, meinl, sabian

## GSC query bucket served
- "which metal drummers use [brand]"
- "[brand] metal drummers"
- "[brand] drums metal"
Purchase-intent + research queries. Complements /llms/gear-by-brand.md (LLM surface, shipped).

## Quality gate
- 8 pages return keyword-matched titles containing brand name
- CollectionPage + BreadcrumbList JSON-LD present
- No regression to gear category pages (#1301) or gear hub (#1300)

## Sequencing
Add the `gearBrandMatch` handler **before** `gearCategoryMatch` — brand slugs (tama/pearl/etc.) would otherwise fall through the category check. This avoids any conflict with #1301.

## Verify
1. `curl -s https://metalforge.io/api/meta/gear/tama | grep -i title` contains "Tama Drums — Metal Drummers"
2. `curl -s https://metalforge.io/api/meta/gear/zildjian | grep CollectionPage` returns match
3. All 8 brand pages return 200
4. No regression: /gear/cymbals still returns category meta (#1301)
5. Google Rich Results Test on /gear/tama shows BreadcrumbList

## Done
- [ ] `GEAR_BRAND_META` map added to `api/meta/[...path].js`
- [ ] `gearBrandMatch` handler inserted before `gearCategoryMatch` block
- [ ] Verified: 8 brand pages return keyword-matched SSR titles
title: SEO batch: Gear brand pages (/gear/<brand>) missing SSR meta — ~8 pages serve generic fallback
